exploration_notes: The ext_authz bypass/passthrough logic is primarily implemented in the HTTP filter (source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/ext_authz.cc and .h). Per-route bypass is handled by getPerRouteFlags() which reads FilterConfigPerRoute to determine skip_check_/disabled status. The authorization decision flow goes through onComplete() which switches on CheckStatus (OK/Denied/Error) from common/ext_authz/ext_authz.h. The immediate response path uses rejectResponse() and sendLocalReply() for denied/error
